summary: The test suite is exceptionally thorough and perfectly follows the complex requirements. It implements a robust harness to run end-to-end tests through 'act' by dynamically creating git repositories and fixtures, while also maintaining a comprehensive unit test suite for fine-grained logic and error handling. It covers all retention policies (age, size, keep-latest), validates policy priority/ordering, includes structural YAML checks with actionlint, and performs exact string assertions on the CLI output as requested.
